description_long: This is a single-story wooden bungalow surrounded by a rectangular fenced yard with a green lawn. The structure features a dark brown gable roof with visible overhangs and a wooden plank facade. The front of the bungalow has a central door flanked by two large windows, while the sides each have two smaller windows. The fencing is made of vertical wooden slats, enclosing the property on all sides. The property includes paved walkways leading to the front entrance and around the yard. The overall appearance is simple and functional, suitable for a suburban or residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gable roof, central front door, large windows, and a fenced green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central door, two large front windows, and the fenced yard with a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, two smaller side windows, and the length of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the fence enclosing the yard, and the symmetry of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two side windows and a clear view of the roof's slope and fenced boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with paired side windows
